Spring Data for Apache Cassandra
  1. org.springframework.data.cassandra
  2. ReactiveResultSet

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.cassandra.ReactiveResultSet

Packages that use ReactiveResultSet
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra
Spring Data's Cassandra abstraction.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql
CQL core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.session
Provides utility classes for simple CqlSession access and various session implementations.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.observability
Infrastructure to provide driver observability using Micrometer.

  • Uses of ReactiveResultSet in org.springframework.data.cassandra

    Methods in org.springframework.data.cassandra that return types with arguments of type ReactiveResultSet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveSession.execute(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.Statement<?> statement)
    Executes the provided query.
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveSession.execute(String query)
    Executes the provided query.
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveSession.execute(String query, Object... values)
    Executes the provided query using the provided values.
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveSession.execute(String query, Map<String,Object> values)
    Executes the provided query using the provided named values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.queryForResultSet(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.Statement<?> statement)
    Execute a query for a ResultSet, given static CQL.
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.queryForResultSet(String cql)
    Execute a query for a ResultSet, given static CQL.
    Mono<ReactiveResultSet>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.queryForResultSet(String cql, Object... args)
    Query given CQL to create a prepared statement from CQL and a list of arguments to bind to the query, expecting a ResultSet.

    Method
    Description
    Publisher<T>
    ReactiveResultSetExtractor.extractData(ReactiveResultSet resultSet)
    Implementations must implement this method to process the entire ReactiveResultSet.

    ReactiveRowMapperResultSetExtractor.extractData(ReactiveResultSet resultSet)
